name: LLM
short: Talk to OpenLumara via API Bridge.
description: A Red v3 cog that routes mentions directly to a local or remote OpenLumara instance using its OpenAI-compliant API bridge.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any data or metadata about users.
install_msg: Thank you for installing the LLM cog! Ensure your OpenLumara API bridge channel is active on port 8000 before sending messages.
author: Dracmas Lovegood
